title: Sleeping at the Airport
content: When severe weather canceled his flight, Noah learned he would need to spend the night at the airport. Like many other travelers, he searched for a quiet corner near his gate and tried to make himself comfortable. Although sleeping in an airport was far from ideal, he used a travel pillow and blanket to rest as much as possible. Throughout the night, announcements echoed through the terminal and cleaning crews continued working. The experience was tiring, but Noah remained positive. After all, unexpected situations were sometimes part of traveling.
